headline: 18 core protocol vault and infrastructure contracts catalogued across 7 chains; 80+ Morpho/Aera/Kamino vaults curated; governance and factory roles pending verification

findings.text: Etherscan search for 'Gauntlet' found Morpho Prime/Balanced USDC/USDT strategies (0x2b8f3789, 0xe3ae7C80) and cbBTC vault (0xF587f2e8); Gauntlet Network EOA (0x6626593c) discovered as operational address.

VaultBook (https://vaultbook.gauntlet.xyz) serves as canonical deployed contracts documentation, listing 80+ vaults across Aera, Morpho, Kamino, and Symbiotic with TVL metrics but requires deeper indexing.
No audit PDFs provided in protocol context. VaultBook references Aera audits by Spearbit and OpenZeppelin, plus Cantina security competition and Immunefi bounty, but audit links not yet extracted.
No GitHub repository provided in protocol context (github: null). Discovery of source code and deployment artifacts requires GitHub repo discovery via web sources.

D2 vault documentation confirms multi-chain presence: gtUSDa vault deployed on Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism; Morpho vaults on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base; Kamino on Solana; per-chain enumeration required.

Gauntlet curates 80+ vaults via Morpho vault factory, Aera, Kamino, and Symbiotic but does not control factory contracts themselves; vault enumeration capped per guidance; Morpho vault factory role pending on-chain verification.

Vault addresses from VaultBook and Etherscan classified as 'vault' or 'provisioner'; Gauntlet Network EOA classified as 'other' (likely operational wallet). Curator role on Morpho vaults requires ABI inspection.
All addresses traced to fetched sources (VaultBook documentation, Etherscan pages); minimal snippet-only risk; on-chain reads pending to verify roles (curator, guardian, owner, fee_recipient).

rationale.verdict: Discovered core vault contracts on 7 pinned chains plus operational addresses from website, VaultBook docs, and Etherscan. Multi-chain gtUSDa vault addresses, Morpho vault examples, and Gauntlet Network EOA extracted with citations. Factory-sourced vaults capped at 50 per guidance; full enumeration deferred. Curator and guardian roles on Morpho vaults require on-chain read verification. GitHub repo and audit PDFs not yet sourced (null in protocol context). Admin/control address roles pending ABI inspection via DeFiPunkd API.

evidence.shows: Website confirms Gauntlet operates 80+ curated vaults with $1.3B+ capital allocated; references to Morpho, Aera, Kamino, Symbiotic; risk management and applied research division.
Canonical vault documentation listing 80+ Gauntlet-curated vaults across Aera, Morpho, Kamino, Symbiotic with per-chain deployment details; governance and strategy pages.

gtUSDa vault contract addresses: 0x000000000001CdB57E58Fa75Fe420a0f4D6640D5 (Base), 0x3bd9248048df95Db4fBD748C6CD99C1bAa40bAD0 (Ethereum), 0x000000001DC8bd45d7E7829fb1c969cbe4D0D1eC (Arbitrum, Optimism); provisioner contracts: 0x18CF8d963E1a727F9bbF3AEffa0Bd04FB4dBdA07 (Base), 0x74C4A66CE4F4779B11E7c63D42e51EEef3A80D11 (Ethereum); PriceAndFeeCalculator references.
Morpho Gauntlet Prime USDC Strategy (0x2b8f3789...9f20a32a1) listed on Etherscan as MetaMorpho vault with curator, guardian, and allocator roles.
Morpho Gauntlet Prime USDT Strategy (0xe3ae7C80...B14e32F26) listed on Etherscan as MetaMorpho vault with curator and guardian roles.
Gauntlet cbBTC Core (gtcbBTCc) MetaMorpho vault at 0xF587f2e8AfF7D76618d3B6B4626621860FbD54e3 on Ethereum; ERC4626 with curator, guardian, allocator, fee management roles.
Gauntlet Network address (0x6626593c237f530d15ae9980a95ef938ac15c35c) EOA with $15.4k across 3 chains and 100 transactions; operational wallet.
Gauntlet USD Alpha allocates to Gauntlet USDC/USDT Prime and Balanced vaults on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism; Morpho-based vault list; strategy rebalancing documentation.

Gauntlet USD Alpha built on Aera infrastructure; Aera contracts audited by Spearbit and OpenZeppelin; Immunefi bug bounty; deposits supported from Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism; $100M+ TVL via Aera since launch.

unknowns: D2: VaultBook lacks centralized deployed-contracts index table; 80+ vaults require enumeration per chain and platform (Morpho, Aera, Kamino, Symbiotic)
D3: Protocol context audit_links null; Aera audits (Spearbit, OpenZeppelin) and Cantina/Immunefi references cited in docs but audit PDFs not fetched
D4: Protocol context github null; no source code repository discovered; deployment artifacts (hardhat-deploy, broadcast JSON) not accessible
D5: Full per-chain contract enumeration incomplete; Solana, Polygon, Hyperliquid L1, Katana, Unichain vaults not yet indexed from docs
D6: Morpho vault factory address not yet identified; vault enumeration via factory.getMarkets() or Morpho registry pending
D6: Kamino, Symbiotic, and Aera factory contract addresses for Gauntlet-curated vault discovery not yet pinned
D7: Roles for discovered Morpho vaults (curator, guardian, fee_recipient, allocator) require on-chain ABI read via DeFiPunkd /api/contract/read
D7: Aera vault guardian service and provisioner contract roles not yet verified on-chain
D8: Provisioner contract addresses from VaultBook require on-chain verification; additional provisioner contracts on Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon not yet discovered

protocol_metadata.about: Gauntlet is a DeFi risk curator operating 80+ vaults across Morpho, Aera, Kamino, and Symbiotic protocols, managing $1.3B+ in TVL. The protocol provides quantitative risk management, yield optimization, and vault curation across 7+ blockchains. Gauntlet's flagship gtUSDa vault on Aera combines variable and fixed-rate USDC yield opportunities across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism. The company also offers applied research services, risk dashboards, and DeFi protocol optimization.
